description: You are a Junior Economist. Create a custom graph on the St. Louis Fed's FRED database (fred.stlouisfed.org) comparing the 'Unemployment Rate' (UNRATE) and 'Labor Force Participation Rate' (CIVPART) on a single chart for the period from 2019-01-01 to the present. Export the graph image to '~/Documents/labor_market_chart.png', the underlying data to '~/Documents/labor_market_data.csv', and bookmark the resulting page as 'Labor Market Dashboard'.
